_doc: Domain benchmarks for the Section D forecast generator. Category keys MUST match forecast_categories.category_name EXACTLY. Benchmarks override naive annualization. A null amount means 'flag for input', never fabricate.

Disability Support Pension.reason: Forward forecast uses the steady-state Centrelink DSP rate $1420.30/fortnight x 26.0893. The trailing actual also includes a one-off DSP backpay lump sum (~$13,687, received via Linda's account and transferred to Renato in Mar 2026) which will NOT recur, so the forecast uses the steady-state rate rather than the inflated actual.

Rent.reason: Renato's rent, $1,000/month paid to GOODWILL CARE. $1,000 x 12 = $12,000/yr.

Other.reason: Single non-recurring receipt (e.g. final/back pay from LACTALIS); routed to Section E one-off, excluded from the recurring Section D forecast.

seasonality_flags.Outings: Lumpy/seasonal spend — naive scaling may mislead; verify against expected events.
seasonality_flags.Home & appliances: One-off-heavy (furniture/whitegoods) — verify before trusting the scaled value.
seasonality_flags.Miscellaneous: Contains recurring NRMA insurance miscategorised here — verify and consider re-categorising.
